scripts.sync-env: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync('../../.env'))fs.copyFileSync('../../.env','./prisma/.env');else console.log('[db] repo-root .env not present - relying on existing ./prisma/.env or process env');"
scripts.postinstall: prisma generate --schema ./prisma/schema.prisma || echo 'prisma generate skipped (expected at workspace install time)'
